_comment: Only Orchestrator writes to manifest.json. All other agents read it or drop signal files.

tasks.input: Review this UI task and add design constraints before it goes to builder: [task description]. Reference DESIGN_SYSTEM.md.

Create [component/service]. Interface spec: [inputs, outputs, behaviour]. Reference ADR-phase-N.md for technical approach. Design constraints from task-001 output apply.

Files needed:
- app/components/RelatedComponent.tsx  (read interface contract)

Add [table/migration/query]. Schema spec: [fields, types, constraints, indexes]. Reference ADR-phase-N.md. schema.prisma may only be modified with explicit user approval: include SCHEMA_CHANGE_APPROVED_BY_USER in this spec if approved.

Files needed:
- prisma/schema.prisma  (read existing schema before adding model)

Wire [feature] using components from task-002. Do not create new primitives. Design constraints from task-001 apply. Reference ADR-phase-N.md.

Files needed:
- app/components/NewComponent.tsx  (from task-002 output)
- app/pages/TargetPage.tsx         (modify to wire feature)

E2E tests for [feature] wired in task-004. Run the following suites:
- npx playwright test tests/e2e/[feature].spec.ts

Builder outputs:
- agent-workspace/builder-composer/output/task-004.md

Read `Files Modified` from the output above to confirm scope before running.

Review task-004 output against DESIGN_SYSTEM.md. Report PASS / DRIFT / BROKEN.

Builder outputs:
- agent-workspace/builder-composer/output/task-004.md

Read the `Files Modified` section from the output above, then review only those UI files.

Review code from tasks 002-004 for quality and security. Flag CRITICAL/HIGH security findings for the user.

Builder outputs:
- agent-workspace/builder-systems/output/task-002.md
- agent-workspace/builder-composer/output/task-004.md

Read the `Files Modified` section from each output above, then review only those files.
